title: Archetypes Configuration
description: Schema for archetypes.yaml — named agent archetype definitions with model preference, system prompt, and optional complexity escalation rules.

archetypes.description: Map of archetype name to archetype configuration.

propertyNames.description: Archetype names must be lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens/underscores, max 32 chars.

system_prompt.description: Role-specific instruction prefix composed with task prompts.

escalate_to.description: Model to escalate to when complexity thresholds are exceeded.

max_write_dirs.description: Escalate when write_allow spans more than this many directory prefixes.

max_dependencies.description: Escalate when package has more than this many cross-module dependencies.

loc_threshold.description: Escalate when package loc_estimate exceeds this threshold.
